calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-09-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Burton McGovern, Esq. for Plaintiff: Edwin F. Lingsch, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Lawrence A. Watson and H. Lawrence Mason.
Exh. 1 - Original Note for $40,000.00-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Copy of Bank of America C/C #2001987067------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 3 - Letter dtd. 3-8-01 by H. Lawrence Mason------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 4 - Modification of Agreement--------------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 5 - Copy of the Promissory Notes dtd. 6-6-2000---------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Lawrence A. Watson and H. Lawrence Mason as follows:
Damages of $100,000.00
Costs per memo of cost.
Post Judgment Interest $8,0490.00, for a Total of $180,490.00
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court, and to prepare Judgment for signature.

May 9, 2006
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2006 Set For Trial On May-08-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
